features: This acrylic sign is perfect for displaying custom messages - the creative options are endless!
description: Product Description Personalise your wedding decor with our acrylic sign with wooden stand, perfect for displaying custom messages. From table numbers to food or bar signs - the creative options are endless! Our stencils (sold separately) are ideal for using with this acrylic sheet. Each pack contains: 1 x Acrylic Wedding sign measuring 14.8cm (W) x 21cm (H) 1 x wooden stand Packaging is recyclable and FSC certified. Safety Warning Not Required
